templates.start_short: A launch point for turning quantum curiosity into tangible academic moves.
templates.start_detail: This path starts from quantum curiosity and branches into research, coursework, projects, and roles that translate advanced theory into visible momentum.

branches.title: Join a Photonics Research Lab
branches.detail: This puts you close to experimental work, faculty mentorship, and real lab culture in photonics-heavy quantum environments.
branches.why: Labs create the strongest bridge from interest to research credibility.
branches.next: Unlocks professor outreach, seminar attendance, and RA roles.

branches.title: Take Quantum Hardware Studio
branches.summary: Build hardware intuition with guided coursework.
branches.detail: A compact way to learn how quantum systems are implemented across optics, control, and hardware constraints.
branches.why: Courses reduce ambiguity and build vocabulary for more advanced opportunities.
branches.next: Unlocks projects, advanced seminars, and stronger technical conversations.

branches.title: Build a Qubit Simulation Project
branches.detail: A lightweight simulation or visualization project helps transform curiosity into something sharable for professors, labs, or employers.
branches.why: Projects make your exploration legible to other people.
branches.next: Unlocks portfolio reviews, startup conversations, and research applications.

branches.title: Meet a Professor in Optical Systems
branches.summary: Anchor your path to a human guide.
branches.detail: Connecting with a faculty member gives context on which subfields matter and what preparation is actually useful.
branches.why: Faculty conversations compress months of uncertainty into one clear direction.
branches.next: Unlocks lab tours, reading lists, and targeted coursework.

branches.title: Explore a Quantum Startup Role
branches.summary: See where research can lead commercially.
branches.detail: This branch focuses on how quantum and photonics skills convert into product, hardware, or software roles in deep tech companies.
branches.why: Career branches make the path feel real and motivating.
branches.next: Unlocks alumni outreach, role comparisons, and internship targeting.

templates.start_short: An exploratory map from health-focused AI interests to research and applied impact.
templates.start_detail: This path helps connect machine learning, clinical context, and communication skills into research groups, projects, and healthcare outcomes.

branches.title: Join Clinical AI Reading Group
branches.summary: Enter the field through a low-friction community.
branches.detail: A reading group gives language, papers, and people before you commit to a full lab or role.
branches.why: Low-friction environments help you test fit quickly.
branches.next: Unlocks lab fit, more precise interests, and smart questions.

branches.title: Take Applied ML for Health
branches.summary: Learn the practical stack for diagnostics and operations.
branches.detail: This course grounds AI concepts in patient flow, diagnostics, and responsible deployment in healthcare contexts.
branches.why: Structured learning gives you a reliable base for deeper exploration.
branches.next: Unlocks projects, internships, and faculty conversations.

branches.title: Prototype a Triage Assistant
branches.summary: Build a useful health-focused AI artifact.
branches.detail: A demo project around triage or summarization helps you learn product framing, ethics, and model limitations.
branches.why: Projects turn abstract goals into concrete evidence of fit.
branches.next: Unlocks portfolio stories and more relevant networking.

branches.title: Connect with Hospital Innovation Lab
branches.summary: Move closer to live problems and impact.
branches.detail: Healthcare innovation teams sit at the intersection of clinicians, operations, and technical builders.
branches.why: Real-world context makes your technical growth much sharper.
branches.next: Unlocks internships, pilots, and role clarity.

branches.title: Aim for Clinical ML Researcher
branches.summary: Frame the path around a concrete destination.
branches.detail: This branch focuses on the knowledge, evidence, and experiences that make a clinical ML career path believable.
branches.why: Concrete end points create better branching decisions.
branches.next: Unlocks milestone planning and adjacent role comparisons.

templates.start_short: A branching path from robotics enthusiasm to labs, systems work, and startup-ready skills.
templates.start_detail: This path helps users build momentum through embodied intelligence, autonomous systems, and visible robotics experiences.

branches.title: Join Autonomous Systems Lab
branches.detail: A lab environment helps you learn sensing, controls, experimentation, and how robotics teams actually operate.
branches.why: Labs turn curiosity into repeated exposure and feedback.
branches.next: Unlocks demos, papers, and professor mentorship.

branches.title: Take Robot Perception
branches.summary: Build the visual and sensing layer.
branches.detail: A perception course trains the mathematical and practical intuition behind how robots understand scenes and objects.
branches.why: Perception creates leverage across research and startup paths.
branches.next: Unlocks manipulation projects and applied demos.

branches.title: Build a Manipulation Demo
branches.summary: Create a standout hands-on portfolio piece.
branches.detail: A manipulation or autonomy demo makes your path visible and gives you something specific to improve over time.
branches.why: Visible demos make robotics progress instantly legible.
branches.next: Unlocks startup nights and lab applications.

branches.title: Attend Robotics Founder Night
branches.summary: See how robotics becomes a company.
branches.detail: Meet founders, hear technical constraints, and understand what skills matter outside the classroom.
branches.why: Career context helps you choose better technical branches.

branches.title: Target Robotics Systems Engineer
branches.summary: Choose a destination and branch toward it.
branches.detail: This path builds toward a concrete systems role spanning sensing, testing, integration, and iteration.
branches.why: End roles help you choose among equally interesting opportunities.
branches.next: Unlocks adjacent jobs and skill milestone planning.
